violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the front entrance, and back storage room is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler fan guards, and dairy cooler shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025
The walk-in freezer door was observed with an accumulation of ice. Freezer door was observed frozen shut. Establishment is to run a defrost on unit. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

The floor in the walk-in cooler area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front entrance and stock room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2024
Drinks were observed stored on the floor in the stock room. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in freezer have an accumulation of ice buildup. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2024

At the time of inspection, three bay sink was lacking water. PIC stated bottom valve was shut off. Valve was turned on at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
The floor coving in ware washing area was in poor repair, observed with improper seal and torn. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
